return(function(b,e,T,X,d,j,y,V,F,x,Y,l,O,M,Q,S,g,Z,n,s,W,q,C)F,Q,n,x,g,s,l,C,q,O,Z,Y,V,W,M,S=function(b,v)local e=s(v)local T=function(T,X,d,j,y)return q(b,{T,X,d;j;y},v,e)end return T
